paths.electron: Electron stays in src/main and src/preload — src/backend and src/renderer must remain Electron-free.
paths.@electron-toolkit/preload: Electron stays in src/main and src/preload — src/backend and src/renderer must remain Electron-free.
paths.@electron-toolkit/utils: Electron stays in src/main and src/preload — src/backend and src/renderer must remain Electron-free.

paths.@renderer/lib/trpc: Components must reach the server through hooks in @renderer/hooks/* — never import lib/trpc directly.
paths.../lib/trpc: Components must reach the server through hooks in @renderer/hooks/* — never import lib/trpc directly.
paths.../../lib/trpc: Components must reach the server through hooks in @renderer/hooks/* — never import lib/trpc directly.
paths.@renderer/lib/daemon: Components must reach the daemon session through hooks (use-app-events, use-terminal-channel, use-files) — never import lib/daemon directly.
paths.../lib/daemon: Components must reach the daemon session through hooks (use-app-events, use-terminal-channel, use-files) — never import lib/daemon directly.
paths.../../lib/daemon: Components must reach the daemon session through hooks (use-app-events, use-terminal-channel, use-files) — never import lib/daemon directly.
paths.electron: Electron stays in src/main and src/preload — src/backend and src/renderer must remain Electron-free.
paths.@electron-toolkit/preload: Electron stays in src/main and src/preload — src/backend and src/renderer must remain Electron-free.
paths.@electron-toolkit/utils: Electron stays in src/main and src/preload — src/backend and src/renderer must remain Electron-free.
